race.comment: PLAYFUL AS (11) is a three-start maiden who was in the placings at her last two starts, finishing third at her latest appearance over 1300m at Cranbourne. Has blinkers added, a great draw and Dean Yendall aboard, so there are plenty of pluses. WARREGO (7) could only manage sixth when resuming two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1225m at Kyneton, beaten only 1.3 lengths. Should be at peak fitness now and draws to take up a handy spot. SPIKE ALMIGHTY (6) has filled a minor placing at both runs this time in, most recently when third over 1100m at Naracoorte. Well placed out to a longer trip now. WAVELETS (14) wound up strongly last time out to finish 0.6 lengths adrift in third over 1307m at Stawell. Backmarker who keeps coming and has solid claims on best form. COOL BEE BEE (2) ran a much-improved race on the home track last start, so now he's at peak fitness he warrants consideration.
